sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16623" key="a)strhne/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀστρηνές</orth>, <sense id="n16623.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">στρηνές</ref></xr>, Id. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἄστρητα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">τὰ ἐγγώνια τὰ ἐντὸς τοῦ δίφρου</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:143" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.143</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
